nasb.text: He said to them, “Did you receive the Holy Spirit when you believed?” And they said to him, “No, we have not even heard whether there is a Holy Spirit.”

esv.text: And he said to them, “Did you receive the Holy Spirit when you believed?” And they said, “No, we have not even heard that there is a Holy Spirit.”

cnv.text: 問他們說：“你們信的時候，受了聖靈沒有？”他們說：“沒有，連聖靈賜下來這件事，我們也沒有聽過。”

ccb.text: 保罗问他们：“你们信的时候有没有领受圣灵？” 他们说：“没有！我们从来没有听过圣灵的事。”

csbs.text: 问他们：“你们信的时候，是否领受了圣灵？” 他们告诉他：“其实我们也没有听说过是否有圣灵。”
